geographic_restrictions: New York state residents and students applying to Binghamton University in New York state
project_area: Undergraduate and graduate admissions, financial aid, and student services at Binghamton University
demographic_requirements: Varies by program (e.g., Educational Opportunity Program (EOP) for low-income first-year and transfer students from historically disadvantaged backgrounds, international students with F1/J1 visas, transfer students, non-degree seeking students, visiting students, and older adults).
eligibility_summary: Open to first-year, transfer, international, non-degree seeking, visiting, and older adult students. Specific programs like EOP have additional financial and academic criteria. Admission is selective and based on academic performance, essays, recommendations, and other factors depending on the applicant type.
